subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! Jinab-i-Mirza Mahdi Ikhwan-i-Safa devoted the span of his life to the exaltation of the Word of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی جناب میرزا مهدی اخوان صفا مدت حیاترا وقف اعلاء کلمه الله نمود
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
